title: Department Manager Vacancy at Flipkart Books - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Flipkart Books - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Books is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Flipkart Books:
Flipkart Books is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Books!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
